name: Carmel Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the chocolate cake mix according to the package directions.
3. Pour 2 cups of batter into a greased 13x9 inch baking pan and bake for 15 minutes.
4. In a heavy saucepan, melt Carmels and margarine with sweetened condensed milk over low heat, stirring until smooth.
5. Spread the caramel mixture evenly over the cake.
6. Spread any remaining batter over the caramel layer.
7. Top with chopped Pecans.
8. Return to oven and bake for 30-35 minutes longer or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
9. Cool and garnish as desired.
